who: billing clerks at medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For billing clerks at medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of patient billing against insurance payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing clerks seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
Send DMs to 20-50 billing clerks with demo video
Participate in community forums for billing clerks
try_it: Allow users to manually enter billing data and generate reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Develop a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Enable CSV import for existing patient data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
